case_title: SURAJ RAJWANI VS. ON THE FLY, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE) FILED BY DEFENDANT ON THE FLY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THIS MATTER HAS ALREADY BEEN HEARD AND A JUDGMENT ENTERED BY WAY OF CSM-16-853543. PLAINTIFF SURAJ RAJWANI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ON THE FLY, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY AMIEL ARAD, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,488.70 FILED BY RAJWANI, SURAJ AS TO DEFENDANT ON THE FLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAJWANI, SURAJ AS TO DEFENDANT ON THE FLY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ON THE FLY, INC.
